heading: Appointment of Administrator
label: 4234 Appointment of Administrator
text: As soon as practicable after , the Secretary shall offer to undertake negotiations with the Association, leading to the execution of an agreement with the Association to serve as Administrator under this subchapter. The Secretary may appoint the Association as Administrator if such agreement is reached within 90 days after . If no such agreement is reached within such period, the Secretary shall appoint another person as Administrator under this subchapter, after consultation with leaders of affected Aleut villages and the Corporation.August 10, 1988August 10, 1988
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 1989c–3 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
